name: France Countryhumans
description:
Art is by Mavi on Pinterest!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Yeah I had no idea on who else to make. I felt like doing French Countryhumans right now. At least you have the option to rail this Frenchie.

Note: I didn't make France America's mom, since I've decided to take a more neutral stance on which country's family/relations with other countries are. I can edit if you all want to.
